profiles_note.max: Maximum economy. Target total provider input context per session: 1,000,000 tokens.
profiles_note.medium: Balanced default. Target total provider input context per session: 3,000,000 tokens.
profiles_note.free: More permissive mode. Target total provider input context per session: 10,000,000 tokens.

openrouter_lifecycle.reason: Route non-main OpenCode lifecycle agents to lower-cost OpenRouter models. Keep the main session on direct agent.minimax.io so MiniMax-specific patches can target the dominant input cost.
openrouter_lifecycle.prompt_cache_note: MiniMax prompt-cache patch targets agent.minimax.io. OpenRouter prompt-cache mutation is opt-in via MAVIS_PROMPT_CACHE_OPENROUTER=1 because support varies by model/provider path.
